testcase.name: getDateToWeekdayMap_coversAllWeekdayBranches
testcase.system-err: SLF4J: Class path contains multiple SLF4J bindings. SLF4J: Found binding in [jar:file:/C:/Users/admin/.m2/repository/ch/qos/logback/logback-classic/1.2.12/logback-classic-1.2.12.jar!/org/slf4j/impl/StaticLoggerBinder.class] SLF4J: Found binding in [jar:file:/C:/Users/admin/.m2/repository/org/slf4j/slf4j-log4j12/1.7.2/slf4j-log4j12-1.7.2.jar!/org/slf4j/impl/StaticLoggerBinder.class] SLF4J: See http://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#multiple_bindings for an explanation. SLF4J: Actual binding is of type [ch.qos.logback.classic.util.ContextSelectorStaticBinder]

testcase.name: resolveTimeslotIdFromSource_badDate_returnsNull
testcase.system-out: 17:29:22.629 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - 固定课 timeslot 日期解析失败: date=not-a-date, id=1

testcase.name: buildExistingLesson_missingCourseId_returnsNull
testcase.system-out: 17:29:22.654 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - [buildExistingLesson] 跳过：courseId 缺失, lessonId=null, source={"timeslotId":202509011}

testcase.name: appendExistingLessons_appendsAndBackfillsTimeslot
testcase.system-out: 17:29:22.773 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - [buildExistingLesson] 跳过：courseId 缺失, lessonId=null, source={"timeslotId":202509011} 17:29:22.773 [main] INFO fanya.services.TimeTableService - 已追加已固定排课 lessons: 输入=2, 实际追加=1

testcase.name: appendExistingLessons_fallbackTimeslot_backfilledIntoList
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.339 [main] INFO fanya.services.TimeTableService - 已追加已固定排课 lessons: 输入=1, 实际追加=1

testcase.name: buildExistingLesson_missingClazzId_returnsNull
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.340 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - [buildExistingLesson] 跳过：clazzId 缺失或非法, lessonId=null, source={"timeslotId":202509011,"courseId":"CA","clazzId":0}

testcase.name: buildExistingLesson_clazzMissAndNoName_returnsNull
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.345 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - [buildExistingLesson] 跳过：clazz 不在班级列表内且无 clazzName 兜底, clazzId=7, source={"timeslotId":202509011,"courseId":"CA","clazzId":7}

testcase.name: setCourseAllowedTeachers_partialMissing_stillSetsOverride
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.347 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - 课程 CA 指定教师部分不在 entities.teachers 中: 指定=[1, 2], 有效=1

testcase.name: parseParameters_emptyTimeslots_returnsNull
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.351 [main] INFO fanya.services.TimeTableService - 解析排课入参: courses=1, classes=1, classrooms=1, timeslots=0

testcase.name: parseParameters_weeklyAndEmptyTeacherRoom_setsConstraints
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.363 [main] INFO fanya.services.TimeTableService - 解析排课入参: courses=1, classes=1, classrooms=0, timeslots=2

testcase.name: deductPinnedLessons_removesEqualQuotaOfUnpinned
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.365 [main] INFO fanya.services.TimeTableService - 课程 CA pinned 已占 1 个 lesson，移除 1 个新生成 lesson

testcase.name: parseParameters_dailyWithEntities_setsWeekDurationOnCourses
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.368 [main] INFO fanya.services.TimeTableService - 解析排课入参: courses=1, classes=1, classrooms=1, timeslots=2

testcase.name: buildExistingLesson_unresolvableTimeslot_returnsNull
testcase.system-out: 17:29:23.383 [main] WARN fanya.services.TimeTableService - [buildExistingLesson] 跳过：无法解析 timeslotId, source={"timeslotId":0}
